CREATE TABLE test_countEqual (arr Array(Int32), x Int32);
INSERT INTO test_countEqual VALUES ([1, 2, NULL, NULL], NULL);
INSERT INTO test_countEqual VALUES ([NULL, NULL, NULL], NULL);
SELECT arr, countEqual(arr, 1) FROM test_countEqual WHERE x = 1;
SELECT countEqual(arr, NULL) AS count_of_nulls FROM test_countEqual WHERE x IS NULL;
SELECT t.arr, (SELECT countEqual(arr, 1) FROM test_countEqual t WHERE t.x = 1) AS count_equal_1 FROM test_countEqual t;
WITH [1, 2, 2, NULL, NULL] AS arr SELECT countEqual(arr, NULL) AS count_nulls;
CREATE TABLE additional_test_countEqual (arr Array(Int32), x Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY tuple();
INSERT INTO additional_test_countEqual VALUES ([1, NULL], 1), ([NULL, NULL], NULL), ([10, 5, 10, 5], 10);
SELECT countEqual(arr, x) FROM additional_test_countEqual WHERE x = 10;
